Philosophy

Your data lives on your machine.

Every Loom app stores its data locally in an open, inspectable format. No sync servers. No vendor lock-in. No subscriptions. You can open your data folder, read it, back it up, or delete it at any time.

We believe desktop software should respect your machine and your privacy. Loom runs entirely offline — no telemetry, no analytics, no internet required.

⊙

Offline first

No internet connection needed. Ever.

◫

Open data

Your files in plain, inspectable formats.

◻

No accounts

No sign-up, no login, no email required.

○

No telemetry

Zero data sent anywhere — guaranteed.

Get started

Start with Macro.

Free, open source, and ships today. No installer required — just download and run.

Download Macro → View all downloads
